name: Mist of the East River
description: The shocking floating corpse case in Donghe, with the black suitcase, the decomposed body, and the pink floral dress. Behind the death of a girl, how many unknown secrets are hidden? Complicated interpersonal relationships, numerous conflicts of interests. The fog of investigating the truth builds up layer upon layer. Lies, disguised as reality, are aiding the evil. How many victims are there behind the web? The truth you see is all the truth?

name: Dunes, roses, bitter moon
description: Even though the moon is bitter, love remains sincere. There is no curiosity, no extremism; it is rooted in the most complex deep affection of human nature and the confrontation with the mundane world; the faint light of love and redemption; the disappearance of pure love. The story takes place in 19th-century America. When the railway tracks replaced the horses, cowboys slowly bid farewell to the wildness and freedom. Every love became fragile, but also more resilient. They protected and clashed with each other, were loyal to each other but betrayed each other, gave to each other but deprived each other... Under that bitter moon, there are six romanticists still holding roses in reality. Although romance is shattered in reality, it still shines in bitterness.

name: WULA WULA
description: The land of Dominica was adorned with a golden robe, and the sea donned a shimmering wedding dress. Wha-la, wha-la, bu-kai-wai, bu-kai-kai...The tribespeople on the island wore silk robes and grass skirts, sitting around the totem and singing hymns for the recently deceased great prophet. The great prophet possessed the wisdom of the gods. He created currency and established a perfect system. The people of the Dominica tribe thus maintained a strong productivity and became the strongest tribe in the sea. Fireworks will eventually fade away, and the gods will eventually fall. Will the young young prophets take over the scepter of the great prophet and lead the tribe to embrace a new era of glory?

name: Illusion Spirit
description: Hundreds of years ago, human beings had been developing along the technological path. Until two men carrying so-called holy books appeared, they opened up a brand new power system in the human world. Humans could finally perceive, influence, and even eliminate the supernatural beings, which is what ordinary people call ghosts. However, this sudden powerful force did not promote peace and progress among humans; instead, it gave rise to even greater desires and ambitions. The two men who originally held the holy book turned against each other and established the [Demon Exorcist Association] and the [Spiritualist Alliance]. The two organizations fought over the holy book ceaselessly. In the wars over the past several hundred years, they had accumulated deep blood feuds. And the lost holy book has now disappeared. Although the two organizations still have minor frictions due to the unbreakable hatred, they have tacitly shifted their focus from the struggle to the research of magic arts. The supernatural world gradually became calm. But the good times did not last long. Recently, many corpses with tragic and terrifying appearances appeared in the city, suspected to be related to the spells recorded in the holy book. The supernatural world once again became turbulent. What kind of power does the holy book represent? Where is the lost holy book now? Perhaps in the stories of these six people, the answers can be found...

name: The Resonance of Chronos Night
description: I had just managed to stop my life, which was like a dam bursting and in a state of total collapse, but I forgot that she was still rotting away bit by bit in my life. Soldier, hold your gun steady and take me to see my family.

name: The Knight's Shadow 2: Sword Over Yan Cloud
description: Above the court, storms arise; beyond the rivers, feuds divide. They say chaos breeds heroes. But with foes at the gates and the kingdom failing, who could truly save it?The princess weeps for her homeland, bidding farewell in sorrow. The knight raises his sword over the Yan clouds — until injustice falls, he will not return. This journey shall settle the storm. Meanwhile, martial legends emerge at every turn. Where steel meets shadow, where love and vengeance entwine... They fight for honor, walk the path of chivalry, end the suffering of millions, and seek peace in an age of fire. For you, I will walk through flames.

name: Requiem of Revenge Under the Black Flames
description: In 1990, a fire broke out on Paradise Island, a private islet off the coast of Japan, and within a single night, the flames reduced the entire island to ashes. In 2020, six detectives are invited back to Paradise Island by a mysterious tycoon, and as they peel back the layers of mystery, they gradually approach the truth – but what awaits them is a conspiracy spanning three decades... The crime scene from 30 years ago has been perfectly recreated. How did the killer instantly move to the second crime scene? Does a fully automated perfect locked-room mystery truly exist? And what is the secret behind that fire?

name: My Family is from Northeast China
description: The eldest brother who hasn't had children for seven years after getting married, the second brother who brought a man-eating demon home for the New Year, the youngest sister who has a boyfriend one year older than her, the elder sister who likes women, and the younger brother who enjoys nude chatting - it's no wonder the elders always say to have more children but only have one - how could there be such excitement?

name: FLYPIG
description: Working for others is so boring. Why not start your own company and become the boss? Although you have 10 million yuan in investment funds, you still need to hire employees, pay salaries, manage the company. Being a boss is not an easy job! But don't worry, there's a saying: as long as the wind is strong, even pigs can fly! In this era's favorable conditions, you will surely fly high and far and achieve financial freedom!

name: The sea is a rain
description: Every person wandering in Luoshen Township is like a firework turned upside down — blooming in silence, searching against the current. This world, poetic and melodic, carries both regret and hope, yet remains magnificent. Until one day, both the sea and the flames vanished from the map. Since then, people have come to see rain as the upside-down sea.

name: I'll Come to See You When the Weather Is Fine
description: In Qiushi County, a legend persists: the veil of rain is the boundary that separates life from death. The departed dwell on the other side, voyaging endlessly across the sea, while the living remain on this side, listening for messages from the dead within the raindrops falling from tens of thousands of feet above. On rainy days, if you hang a Teru Teru Bozu (sunny-skies doll) under the eaves, the sky will break open with clearing light, and the blessing of the sea god will guide the distant ships, appearing on the far horizon. When the weather turns fine, the one you long for will step through the vanished rain curtain and come to stand before you.

name: A Little Red Flower for You
description: When we were little, our pants always seemed to fray for no reason. The tree trunks were filled with children sitting on them. The chirping of insects on summer nights and the popsicles wrapped in quilts — my childhood memories seem just like everyone else's. Grandma sat beside us, gently waving a fan, and we never knew when she would fall asleep as she looked at us — maybe she was dreaming the same dream as the scene before her. Grandpa wore a white tank top and baggy shorts, while the radio beside him hummed opera tunes we couldn't understand, his head bobbing slightly along with the melody. In Mother's diary, she recorded the story of her and Dad. And in one chapter of that story, there was me — an intruder who had stumbled into their world. So from then on, both hope and sorrow shone into our lives like a beam of light. And we — we are their one and only little red flower.

name: Lilliput and Brobdingnag
description: When the first wisp of morning breeze drifts across the Misty Sea, the land of Lilliput opens the world's wonders first. The little knight's sword plays with the sunlight; the little elves use candies as their weapons; the princess's gown soars through the sky and dives to the earth, as the little witch flies to and fro. The elephant by the roadside doffs its hat in greeting, and the little mythical beast leaps into the air. The trees and grass on both sides grow clearer and clearer, heading toward all the unseen landscapes that await. Through a dense forest — who is playing a melody with magic? Faintly and indistinctly, one can also hear the roars of monsters from the land of Brobdingnag on the other shore. Watch out, watch out! Gather round, gather round! Prepare for battle, prepare for battle!

name: Yi Shu
description: New ghosts cry out in grievance, old ghosts weep in despair; The sky darkens, rain dampens all, as the sound of a qin stirs the air. At midnight, unexpected guests arrive, refusing to stay the night; Grudges, love, and vendettas deepen — each watch of night feels tight.

name: HORROR STORY
description: What were you doing at half past one in the middle of the night?

name: The Road
description: At night, a car drives along the national highway, heading toward an unknown destination. Inside sit a family of five. One... two... three... one... two... three... Mother keeps muttering something under her breath, counting the people in the backseat. Father drives as if in a trance, lost to himself. The three children have no idea what is happening. What has become of this family? When did it start to fall apart? But then again, what is a normal family supposed to look like? Mom, Dad, where are we going? The hour has come. It's time to hit the road.

name: Yoko Yamada
description: 'Happy birthday! Make a wish, girl.''Wow! Snow-white candles, holy hymns, awesome! Now, I want to see my friends.'......The chainsaw roars, the evil spirits surround, who can escape alive? What sinister force is manipulating everything behind the truth? From illusion to reality, take you to experience the most profound despair!

name: Sister Drum
description: Xiangyang Village is located in the Eighteen-Thousand-Mile Mountain range of the Daliang Mountains. It is surrounded by mountains and has a remote location. This village is like a ghostly place, existing only in people's mouths. There is no road, no electricity, and no internet here. Had it not been for that fire, Xiangyang Village would never have come to the attention of the public. And the most mysterious thing about Xiangyang Village is undoubtedly the Anzheng Festival held every ten years. On the day of the Anzheng Festival, 'Amei' stands tall on the altar and strikes the elder sister drum. The drumbeats resound, and all the villagers solemnly look in that direction. They will recite a strange song in their mouths:'Drum spirit, the incense has burned and the moon is full. The Drum Spirit comes to meet. I wish to offer my skin, to give you the spirit-warming robe. I hear the drum sound, the Drum Spirit comes to meet. I hear the drum sound, the Drum Spirit comes to meet...'

name: All wishes come true
description: What wishes do you have that you want to come true? Riches overnight? Smooth love? Good health? The death of someone you dislike? The resurrection of someone who has died? These impossible dreams can all be realized. The price? Just some insignificant things. Don't worry about them. The most important thing is that the wishes come true... Repeat after me, and the wishes will be realized immediately. 'Don't think about the past, don't fear the future, live in the present, give and take, and your wishes will come true.' Shh! Did you just read this passage? It seems someone has arrived...

name: Eumenides 2: Darker
description: Why do all the deceased die with a smile? Seven bizarre cases, a pair of eyes observing from the dark. When will this game of manipulating human lives come to an end? And could you rescue the victim in time from her/his hands? Who is really manipulating everything behind the scenes?

name: HIDDEN AT THE END OF TIME
description: The demise of the ancient Shintoist family, the culprit who vanished in the public eye, the unsolvable murder cycle on the isolated island. The answers to all these puzzles? It was the predestined death bestowed upon the living by the deceased. And all of this ultimately points to the sinister plot that transcends the millennia of the murder deity. Time? Reincarnation? Cause and effect? All of these will converge at the end of fate....

name: Elven Island · Guardian
description: Passing by the mysterious sea area, an island that has never been marked on the nautical map and has not been recorded in the historical text will appear in the uncharted place. The island of the elves has never been known to anyone. The elves living on this island and the entire story of them are just legendary tales. When you truly face these elegant creatures, the veil is gently lifted at the corner, and more unknown things are just waiting for your exploration. The joyous and cheerful feast is complemented by innocent and simple smiles, and the distant and mournful sadness in the shadows adds the finishing touch to this painting that has been silent for thousands of years. A competition filled with desires and obsessions is being held in the song. The contract mage, are you ready?

name: The Story of Swordsman
description: In the martial world, where dragons and tigers once roamed, now leaderless they stand; atop Xuanyu Tower, Xie Yu listens to the wind. A hundred years have passed since the black-robed demon lord fell, yet the rivers and lakes remain not as before. The Martial Alliance Chief builds Xuanyu Tower; with sword sweeping the eight wilds, chivalrous figures bloom like splendid brocade. But behold, a jug of turbid wine—how many fleeting wonders. Alas, we speak of the dreamlike realm of martial heroes, of lovesick youths and maidens, of faded clashing swords, of distant feuds and debts. One might think it a tale of lone heroes, chivalrous hearts, and winding turns. Yet no famed warrior appears—only a straw-cloaked figure venturing out at night, sword leveling the storm. In this chaotic, war-torn age, all living beings know suffering, every passion brings its sin. Then let me, one day, draw my sword and rise—only to usher in another decade of calamity for the mortal world!

name: Flowers Without Fruit
description: Five inexplicable deaths. Seven summoned to judge. One self-confessed demon of murder. Those invisible, colossal hands toy ruthlessly with the fates of all. Watered by despair and sin, a nameless flower blooms upon the wasteland of eternal night. And that bullet—forged from her lies and her very life—will at last become the light that tears through the dawn.

name: Legendary gambler
description: Under the flickering neon lights of the gambling city, dreams and reality intertwine. People, with hope or despair, flock to this gambling city. Every corner of this place is filled with the allure of betting. The casino is filled with the sounds of chips colliding, as if telling countless tales of pursuit of wealth and honor. Here, everyone aspires to become a gambling god.

name: The Black Flag
description: A sudden storm, mysterious singing, the cannons of the Royal Navy... Shipwreck Cove, shrouded in mist, where the wreckage of sailing vessels piles up like mountains. Eight young men and women from different nations stand on edge, swords drawn—a battle seems inevitable. 'Cough, cough, perhaps you should hear me out first...' Juan stepped out from the darkness... A familiar voice rings in your ears once more: 'Full sail, raise the black flag!' Captain, what are you waiting for? Quick, we weigh anchor!

name: Pay a New Year call
description: 'Happy New Year, happy New Year!' A new era brings new changes. Majia Village embraces fresh customs. Two-story houses rise from the ground. Golden rice carpets the fields. Young and old dress in new clothes—the elderly stay fit and well. At the village entrance, crowds push and shove. Some return home, some visit family. Gifts are exchanged, bonds renewed, old struggles revisited. But listen closely amidst the clinking glasses—this is no joyful celebration. The talk is all about dividends, about money. The question is: whose pocket will it end up in...

name: Get Shoot
description: In New York, Manhattan, inside a luxury office overlooking Central Park, you sit or stand, laughing and chatting as you await the latest orders. Don Corleone strokes the white cat in his arms. 'How's the view from this office?' Looking out, New York stretches before you without a trace of obstruction—family businesses everywhere. 'This whiskey, fifty years old—does it taste good?' Taking a sip, you savor the rich aroma of time and power. 'This bodyguard—looks reliable, doesn't he?' You stare at the bodyguard named Stallone, built like a rock—a man who once took a bullet for the Don without hesitation. 'Within three months, whoever can eliminate the family's biggest headache will be the new successor! All the bodyguards, the fine wine, and the entire underground empire of New York—anything you desire, it's yours!' Absolute madness! You're already itching to pull out your gun and shoot the old associates beside you—who wouldn't want that?! With the ever-expansion of power, the relentless pursuit from the police and the federal bureau, the vicious probing of vengeful enemies, and the intensifying infighting within the family—who will rise above it all, treated like royalty, and become the new acting head of the family who rules with an iron fist? You can't wait to find out...

name: Mr.Box's Secret Store
description: 'Ding-dong! Welcome!' The crisp chime awakens the lights of the shop. I look toward the source of the glow and see a shopkeeper with a black box on his head, his shadow stretching long with each step. This is a 'secret shop' open late at night. On the shelves sit many black mystery boxes, each painted with an eerie white smiling face—a smirk of silent mockery. 'Hello there, I'm the owner of this shop. You can call me Mr. Box.' 'The secret mystery boxes on these shelves are all secrets left behind by other customers.' 'So I won't charge any fees—I only accept trades: a secret for a secret.' The shopkeeper's voice is muffled by the black box, yet it can't hide his excitement and anticipation. He seems eager for us to strike a deal with him. A strange shop. A strange shopkeeper. They always stir people's curiosity...

name: No. 37, Lin's Residence
description: In the late Qing Dynasty and early Republic of China, the eldest son of the Lin family died suddenly. The family immediately began to plan a funeral marriage. You, as a distant relative invited to come, stepped into the Lin family estate. At that moment, the red lanterns were extinguished one after another, and whispers could be heard from beneath the bride's veil...

name: Red and Black Mansion Incident
description: On the isolated island, the Red and Black Mansion, six invited guests, and a relentless downpour. The mansion's owner died in a locked room, and the murderer is among you. There are no ghosts or gods, only the terrifyingly intricate human schemes.

name: Bed Check
description: At the end of the corridor of the abandoned girls' dormitory, the dormitory inspection bell rings every night on time. It is said that a girl went missing here ten years ago. Tonight is your shift - footsteps can be heard coming from the stairwell.

name: Three Strikes 2
description: In the ancient mansion, at the third hour of the night. You were hired as the night watchman, but you happened to see two [ladies] sitting facing each other in the front hall. They looked up at you, their smiles stretching all the way to their ears - this mansion has been without any living people for twenty years.

name: Escape from the Weird School: Part 1
description: This is a school with no exit. The corridors stretch endlessly, and the classrooms are always locked. The radio keeps playing the same school rule over and over: After hearing the bell for class, please immediately enter any classroom - provided there are seats available in that classroom.

name: Roll Call
description: On the first day of transferring schools, you noticed a name that had been repeatedly scribbled out on the roll call list. After school, responses could be heard in the empty classroom. On the wall, in blood, it read: [Take attendance] (pointing to the roll call). Next, it was your turn.

name: The Last Goodbye
description: In 1941, at the Polorama in Shanghai. You were an underground worker. Tonight's mission was to obtain that list. The phonograph was playing [Night Breeze]. In the center of the dance floor, the woman turned around - she was your fiancée whom you had [sacrificed] three years ago.

name: The Originator
description: In the cubicle of the girls' restroom, there are numerous sticky notes dedicated to [her]. You are the bystanders trapped here, and you were also the perpetrators back then. Pandora's box has been opened. Who was the first person to write the curse?

name: Later Us
description: Lingxian Lingxian, I am your present life. The elevator of this apartment always stops at the 13th floor, and when the door opens, there is no one inside. Until one day, you saw the girl in the mirror behind you, wearing a red dress - she looked exactly like you.

name: Mojin Captain II: Tomb of the Tiger General
description: The entrance to the Tiger General Ling's tomb is hidden beneath the hot spring. You will descend into the tomb with your equipment. There are no ghosts, only deadly mechanisms and thousand-year-old puzzles. Physical strength, teamwork, and archaeological knowledge - all are indispensable.

name: Escape from the Haunted Manor
description: This is a game of hide-and-seek, but you are the prey! Trapped in a strange old Japanese house, there is a ghost-like girl wandering in the darkness. You must avoid her sight, solve the puzzles inside the house, and find the exit before dawn. Remember: don't be discovered, or 'it' will come for you.

name: Murder Mystery
description: You receive a mysterious invitation to a funeral. In a dark forest cemetery, as the coffin is being buried, a family feud is revealed. You must act as detectives, piecing together fragmented evidence to uncover the truth behind the murder and identify the culprit hidden among the mourning crowd.

name: Murder at Gatsby Gala
description: Welcome to the luxurious 1920s dinner party. Under the glittering crystal chandeliers, a grand Gatsby-themed retro party is in full swing. But amid the revelry, a gunshot rings out, shattering the night sky, and a prominent figure falls to the ground. Dressed in exquisite vintage attire, you will transform into guests of the upper class, searching for the murderer among the clinking of glasses and the exchange of toasts, for the culprit might be among you.

name: INSANE
description: You have been imprisoned in an abandoned mental hospital. This place is occupied by the deranged former director and the twisted mutant patients. The strange figure on the poster, wearing a mask and eating like a wild dog on the ground, is just the beginning of the horror. You must find a way to survive and escape from this hell on earth amidst the extreme chaos, screams and chase.

name: Morgan Hotel Ghost
description: In 1947, a tragic incident occurred at the mysterious Morgan Hotel. The demonic horn creature depicted on the poster suggested that the evil and powerful spirits residing there were malevolent. As investigators, you entered this hotel that had been sealed for many years. Not only were there ghosts here, but there was also a hidden underground story shrouded in deeper darkness.

name: ECO: Ruins of Immortality 1865
description: In 1865, in an ancient and deep alley, an indelible echo reverberated. This was a story about 'reincarnation' and 'attachment'. In the dim and shadowed long corridor, you would see the silhouette of a solitary woman. She seemed to be searching for something, or waiting for a certain promise. You need to use the light and shadow to solve the mystery of space, and listen to that mournful cry that has lingered for a hundred years and never ceased.

name: DRESSER
description: You are a group of journalists, invited to visit a famous writer named 'Faust' who has been living in seclusion in the mountains for many years. In the dimly lit study, you discover the writer's manuscripts, dressing table, a blood-stained garment... This is not an ordinary interview; it is about uncovering a mystery related to 'memory', 'atonement' and 'repentance'.

name: INSANE 2
description: You enter as patients in a mental hospital. You need to evade the 'nurses' pursuit in the chaotic corridors and search for evidence to uncover the truth behind this series of murders at the mental hospital.

name: THE NEXT
description: You are tied to a chair in an abandoned orphanage. 'Despair' is the nightmare experienced by patients with schizophrenia. The core mechanism of the game is identity swapping. You must constantly think about who you really are and distinguish between reality and illusion. After each 'reset', you will find that everyone's memories have been implanted. This chase is not just a pursuit - it is an exploration for finding a way out in a surreal dream world.

name: DOLLS' HOUSE
description: The dolls are watching you. Inside an abandoned toy shop, their eyes follow your every move. Decipher the children's clues and uncover the truth of the souls trapped inside.

name: No More Rain
description: She dances alone in the rain. Step into a girl's memory of loss and longing. Every raindrop is a goodbye she never said. When the rain finally stops, will she find peace — or disappear forever? A heartbreaking journey through grief, memory, and the courage to let go.

name: TEDDY
description: An abandoned house. A dusty attic. Hundreds of teddy bears stare at you with empty eyes. On the wall, a faded missing poster: 'Have you seen Noah?' In the darkness, a small figure appears — a boy holding a teddy bear. He never speaks. He only points toward a locked wooden door. You follow. You open the door. Inside, there is no boy. Only a small child-sized coffin. And inside it, a teddy bear wearing a tiny black suit. What happened to Noah? And why do the bears seem to remember?
